name: J1939TestChkCreate_RelCycleTimeViolation
title: J1939TestChkCreate_RelCycleTimeViolation
syntax: long J1939TestChkCreate_RelCycleTimeViolation(dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dbMessage dbMsg, double minCycleTime, double maxCycleTime, [char callback[]] )
description: Cycle time check for a J1939 parameter group. The message attribute GenMsgCycleTime must be defined for the message. The minimum and maximum cycle time is a relative factor to the cycle time from the database.
